headline: Is Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (WBD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is WBD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. on The Mispricing Desk’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on WBD. Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc.’s share was trading at $26.47 as of June 8th. WBD’s trailing and forward P/E were 93.79 and 2.50k respectively […]
